news.t: The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Growth ETF's Underlying Holdings Imply 15% Gain Potential
The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Growth ETF's Holdings Could Mean 13% Gain Potential

holdings.infoBox: MDYG is an equity ETF with a total of 243 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 3.00%, Twilio at 1.69%, TechnipFMC at 1.56%, Carpenter Technology at 1.52%, and Curtiss-Wright at 1.52%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Growth ETF (MDYG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 Growth index, a market-cap-weighted index of growth companies selected from the S&P 400. MDYG was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: The SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Growth ETF's Underlying Holdings Imply 15% Gain Potential
data.text: For the SPDR S&P 400 Mid Cap Growth ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $58.37 per unit.
